text: Delivered docs/examples.md (11 sections: getting-started, dense, solvers/factorizations, spectral, sparse, sized layer, syntax modules, Breeze migration, accuracy/determinism, Scala.js/Wasm, + pointer to the compiled suite) and a TEST-BACKED core/shared/.../gale/examples/WorkedExamplesSuite.scala (5 tests). Reviewed inline: every assertion recovers an independently-known value (regression coeffs 2/3 exact; OLS normal-eqns cross-check; PCA leading eigenvector = constructed principal dir via provably-diagonal scatter, dot(cu,cv)=0; Laplacian zero-gap+Fiedler community split; sparse L*ones=0) — no tautological/weak tolerances. Authoring agent compiled every doc code-block in temp smoke files and fixed real API surprises (qr is total not Either; Lanczos needs k<n; Jacobi precond needs Matrix not operator; Svds partial-only). Green: coreJVM 346, coreJS 343, interopBreeze 16.
